title: Salbox's Technical MC
description: A Modpack created for Technical Minecraft(TMC). Includes the most common vanilla technical quality of life mods.
body:
### <center>SALBOX'S TECHNICAL MC(TMC)</center>
<center>A modpack created for Technical MC(TMC). This modpack includes the most common quality of life client mods such as MaliLib mods, performance mods, etc. on each Minecaft-version.</center>
</br>
</br>
</br>

## FAQ
<details>
<summary>What mods does the modpack have?</summary>

[Click any version to see an updated modlist.](https://modrinth.com/modpack/salboxs-technical-mc/versions)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Missing a mod?</summary>

Please join the [discord-server](https://discord.gg/X4NnWdbeyy) and post a suggestion in the [suggestions channel](https://discord.com/channels/457518140209758209/1390263039533780992).

</details>







_I, Salbox, is not associated with any of the mods in this modpack and all credits goes to those who keep them alive and up to date._
